milestones: Learn data structures and control flow in Python
Master functions, modules, and file handling
Get familiar with libraries and frameworks
Build a simple project to integrate all learned concepts

dailyTasks.title: Introduction to Python
dailyTasks.description: Set up Python environment, learn about variables, data types, and basic syntax.

dailyTasks.title: Control Structures
dailyTasks.description: Understand conditional statements and loops (if, for, while).

dailyTasks.title: Data Structures
dailyTasks.description: Learn about lists, tuples, sets, and dictionaries.

dailyTasks.title: Functions
dailyTasks.description: Understand how to define and call functions, and learn about parameters and return values.

dailyTasks.title: Modules and Packages
dailyTasks.description: Learn how to import and use modules, and understand package management with pip.

dailyTasks.title: File Handling
dailyTasks.description: Learn how to read from and write to files in Python.

dailyTasks.title: Error Handling
dailyTasks.description: Understand exceptions and how to handle errors gracefully.

dailyTasks.title: Introduction to Libraries
dailyTasks.description: Get familiar with popular libraries like NumPy and Pandas.

dailyTasks.title: Data Analysis with Pandas
dailyTasks.description: Perform basic data analysis and manipulation using Pandas.

dailyTasks.title: Web Scraping with Beautiful Soup
dailyTasks.description: Learn the basics of web scraping and extracting data from websites.

dailyTasks.title: Introduction to Frameworks
dailyTasks.description: Get an overview of web frameworks like Flask or Django.

dailyTasks.title: Start Your Project
dailyTasks.description: Begin working on a simple project that utilizes what you've learned.

dailyTasks.title: Complete Your Project
dailyTasks.description: Finish your project, ensuring all features are working as intended.

dailyTasks.title: Review and Reflection
dailyTasks.description: Review what you've learned, seek feedback, and plan next steps for further learning.

successMetrics: Complete all daily tasks on time
Build and run a final project successfully
Demonstrate understanding through quizzes or coding challenges
challenges: Understanding complex concepts like libraries and frameworks
Maintaining motivation throughout the learning process
plan.motivationalApproach: Set small, achievable goals and reward yourself after completing each milestone. Join online communities for support, and share your progress to stay accountable.

dailyTasks.title: HTML & CSS Basics
dailyTasks.description: Learn the structure of HTML documents and how to style them using CSS. Complete exercises on creating a basic webpage.

dailyTasks.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
dailyTasks.description: Cover the basics of JavaScript including variables, data types, functions, and control structures. Practice coding simple scripts.

dailyTasks.title: Build a Simple Web Project
dailyTasks.description: Combine your knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to create a simple web application, such as a personal portfolio or a to-do list app.

successMetrics: Completion of HTML and CSS exercises
Successfully write and run JavaScript code snippets
Deployment of a simple web project that showcases HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
challenges: Time management - balancing learning with practice
Maintaining focus during intensive study sessions
plan.motivationalApproach: Set small goals for each task and reward yourself upon completion. Share your progress with a friend or mentor for accountability, and remind yourself of the long-term benefits of learning web development.

milestones: Understand the basics of JavaScript syntax and data types
Learn control structures (loops, conditionals) and functions
Master DOM manipulation and event handling
Build a small project using the learned concepts

dailyTasks.title: Introduction to JavaScript
dailyTasks.description: Learn about JavaScript history, its role in web development, and get familiar with variables, data types, and basic syntax.

dailyTasks.title: Control Structures and Functions
dailyTasks.description: Understand if statements, loops (for, while), and function creation and invocation.

dailyTasks.title: DOM Manipulation
dailyTasks.description: Learn how to select HTML elements, modify them, and handle events using JavaScript.

dailyTasks.title: Asynchronous JavaScript
dailyTasks.description: Understand callbacks, promises, and the fetch API to handle asynchronous operations.

dailyTasks.title: Build Your First Project
dailyTasks.description: Create a simple interactive web application that incorporates everything learned throughout the week.

successMetrics: Completion of daily tasks and quizzes
Ability to write JavaScript code to solve basic problems
Successful creation and deployment of a small project
challenges: Maintaining focus with limited time each day
plan.motivationalApproach: Set small, achievable goals each day and reward yourself upon completion. Join online forums or study groups for community support and encouragement.
